title: Deepest points humans ever reached (m)

source.name: Deepest human-made / human-visited points
source.publisher: Guinness World Records / NOAA / published surveys

notes: Real published figures, rounded for narration. Kola Superdeep Borehole final depth 12,262 m (1989); Challenger Deep ~10,935 m (2021 survey); Mponeng mine ~4,000 m; Veryovkina cave 2,212 m.
